74938.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
74938.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/a761cad4108b33fcd795b1c249c311e789827fd1/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

74937.subject: AI Slop Is Transforming YouTube. Its CEO Wants To Keep It Human.
74937.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-slop-transforming-youtube-its-ceo-wants-keep-human-ui8oc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BA1HvOq0zRE%2B5ISGjoy8dKQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2gpGbwphB4eIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqppykmr~e8-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqppykmr-e8
  
Good evening, YouTube is the indisputable king of online video with 2.7 billion users. The site has faced its fair share of challenges over the years, like accusations of radicalizing users or harming their mental well-being. But now, AI has the power to transform the site—and the content on it—completely. CEO Neal Mohan doesn’t downplay it. “This is a profound paradigm shift, and the technology is going to dramatically change how things are done,” he says. Here’s how the video giant aims to fight AI slop. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images What We Know About The Future Of Amazon’s Dropped Sam Altman Film Biopic Amazon backed out of its deal to distribute “Artificial,” a biopic about Altman, and said it would be “better served if it were released by a different studio.” Getty Images SpaceX Earns Lowest Corporate Responsibility Rating—Here’s What That Means This rating is awarded to companies that have “very poor management measures.”
Приєднатися до обговорення

74936.subject: Ethereum's Coordination Layer: EF Plan Lands, Ethlabs Spins Out
74936.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

**These are the biggest stories in Web3:**

* **[Ethereum Foundation's](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay)**[ interim ED lays out strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay)

* **[Five former EF researchers](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum)**[ launch Ethlabs](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum)

* **[WSJ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/wsj-1-9m-fake-bets-polymarket-creator-videos)**[ says $1.9M in fake bets propped up Polymarket](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/wsj-1-9m-fake-bets-polymarket-creator-videos)

* **[ENS DAO](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ens-dao-temp-check-empowering-ens-foundation-treasury-handover)**[ opens temp check on handing treasury to ENS Foundation](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ens-dao-temp-check-empowering-ens-foundation-treasury-handover)

* [Ethereum's most active sandwich bot was drained for $7.5M](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/jaredfromsubway-eth-mev-bot-drained-7-5-million-counter-mev-honeypot)

Ethereum's coordination layer reshuffled in public Monday. The **Ethereum Foundation**'s interim executive director [released the 'EF Way' execution plan](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay) — a tighter agenda built around MEV elimination, privacy primitives, and ETH-as-payment work — three days after [Hsiao-Wei Wang stepped down as co-executive director](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/ethereum-foundation-hsiao-wei-wang-resigns-co-executive-director). The same morning, [five former EF researchers launched Ethlabs](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum), an independent non-profit R&D lab for Ethereum.

The two announcements split EF's prior research footprint into a tighter execution org and a parallel external lab. Ethereum now has **two non-profits steering its R&D** — and the question for the next two-year cycle is whether the interim ED's plan and Ethlabs' agenda converge on shared roadmap or diverge into parallel tracks. Add to that the **ENS DAO** opening a temp check on handing day-to-day operational and treasury authority to the ENS Foundation, and Monday becomes another day filled with foundation-vs-DAO governance questions we've seen this year.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/17094c7a-df77-4075-8936-b7d44974c151/image.png)
Caption:

74932.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Taiko warns users to pull funds
74932.body:
Altura winds down stablecoin vault after 'unprecedented level' of withdrawal requests | Michael Saylor's Strategy buys another 520 BTC for $35 million, adds to USD reserve despite STRC slide | Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail | Ethereum 'tax' debate erupts over proposal to redirect portion of staking rewards to ecosystem funding |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

Figure Markets ( https://figuremarkets.onelink.me/Plnq/theblocknewsletter?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! Analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405557/between-supportive-and-restrictive-forces-bitcoin-stalls-near-64000-as-fed-rate-hike-risk-overshadows-iran-ceasefire-relief?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin* is stuck near $64,000 as *Fed* rate-hike fears and continued ETF outflows eclipse the relief rally sparked by the U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

In today's newsletter, *Taiko* halts block production following an exploit, *Altura* winds down its stablecoin yield vault, *Strategy* adds to its *bitcoin* treasury and *USD reserve* despite *STRC's* slide, and more.

Meanwhile, *MoneyGram* became ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405568/moneygram-solana-validator-blockchain-payments?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) a *Solana* validator, expanding its blockchain payments strategy.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*⚠️ Ethereum Layer 2 Taiko halts block production following exploit; urges users to withdraw funds*

Taiko ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405486/taiko-confirms-exploit?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Taiko* confirmed an exploit in its chain state verification mechanism and warned users to withdraw funds from all bridges deployed on the *Ethereum* Layer 2 network.

* The project said all bridges on Taiko should be treated as insecure and asked centralized exchanges to suspend deposits of its native token until further notice.
* Taiko halted new block production across all proposers while it investigated the incident and worked with its Security Council and ecosystem partners to contain the breach.
* The team said an attacker exploited a flaw in bridge message-proof verification, allowing forged proofs to
